creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
(In reply to Ashish SHUKLA from comment #16)

Hi,

I still have the same problem with my configuration.

If you want to close it I agree, but I propose to leave it for now. I was quite busy lately so I was working around with manual restarts, but I would like to find the issue, and for that I plan to create another jail with default configuration, see if there's no problem, and then slowly add features one by one (ldap etc.) to find where exactly problems start.

I guess I will have to use quarterly ports and not main because there's another problem with latest ejabberd / erlang combination I reported in another PR:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=259067

Best regards,
